horoscope: You may want to put something behind you once and for all today, dear Aries, but it can be difficult to know how to do so, or to follow through. Unsettled matters and the things you haven’t done may temporarily interfere. You are more inclined to examine the past for answers these days, but while the tendency is to do so in an analytical manner, you may benefit a lot more if you engage your feelings. This can be a time of some impatience, but you'll be at your best if you can pace yourself a little. Finding a balance is important today, and it might mean taking things one step at a time. Detaching just enough from a situation helps you make necessary changes and boosts your enjoyment.

Today's transits can produce minor frustration or blocks, dear Taurus. You may lack a sense of purpose or mission, which keeps you from pursuing your desires straightforwardly. Past mistakes can assume more importance than usual in your mind. While confidence may be lacking temporarily, the workarounds you choose can ultimately work in your favor. Aim to avoid overthinking, particularly related to your social life, networks, and friendships. You may need to remind yourself to be tactful if being forthright. The Moon's move to the top of your solar chart brings your priorities to mind as the day advances.

Today, you can find yourself with big ambitions, dear Gemini, but some challenges in finding an outlet for them. You may be craving action but not quite sure where to start. Distractions can take the form of touchy or sensitive people around you. While clearing the air may be what you need, there is a tendency to be too defensive to make much progress for now, so waiting it out may be best. Certainly, inner frustrations can be triggered if there has been tension with your larger goals or worldly responsibilities. Fortunately, you can use this energy to your advantage, as the desire to overcome frustrations can motivate you to make changes or put an irritating situation behind you. Aim to avoid overthinking your long-term plans or fretting about things that are beyond your control. Don't let this overpower your gut feelings or overshadow your emotional needs.

Today's transits aren't entirely smooth, dear Cancer, which can produce restlessness. As passionate as you are feeling, without the proper channels to release this energy, you could be spinning your wheels. Others can be defensive or self-protective. Mental agitation and nervousness can be distracting, especially when making long-range plans. Try to avoid overthinking and aim to connect with what you want to do so that you can factor your heart in as well. Also, aim to get in touch with your true desires before taking action for the best results. Hastiness can lead to missteps. Still, you can have a hard time relaxing until you face your frustrations, and today’s Mars-Chiron transit can help pave the way for that opportunity, even if it can be somewhat chaotic.

The Moon moves into your opposing sign today, dear Leo, challenging you to find a better balance in your life for a couple of days. Looking at things from a different angle can help. The need for others becomes more obvious today, and sometimes this influence prompts you to seek advice or one-to-one connections. You can feel energized today, but you could lack a satisfying channel for expressing your enthusiasm. People may not be especially confident, and it’s not easy to know what they want. Centering yourself now may be necessary to share yourself more freely and happily with others later. Watch for overthinking to the point that you ignore what you feel about a matter today. Pace yourself.

You can be passionate about something and crave action and progress today, dear Virgo. However, something’s not ready to budge, which can be frustrating. However, you have much to learn about yourself through the conflicts or roadblocks you are facing now. It’s best to be patient. As well, it's crucial to avoid living too much in your head today, particularly when relating to others. The tendency is to separate from your feelings when connecting or communicating, which can lead to some confusion or mixed messages. With heightened feelings, it can also be a time when conflicts are more likely.

Although you may struggle with some restlessness or vague discontent at times today, dear Libra, you have much to learn about your true desires. You can be passionate about something or ready to take on the world on the one hand, but circumstances don’t seem to support your plans, not yet anyway, or plans may not come together as you’d like. Defensiveness is best avoided — aim to rise above it and focus on resolving problems. At the same time, taking the time to regroup is another option that can be rewarding. The tendency to overthink is high in spots today, and so is the inclination to fret. Handle problems before they manage to take over, but give yourself frequent breaks if possible.

The day holds some moody and bumpy energy, dear Scorpio, but you are also learning a lot about what you truly desire. Energy can come on strong, but outlets may not emerge as quickly. There may be some problems involving others’ demands on your time. Watch for overthinking creative and romantic matters today. While you do need to review and backtrack in these areas, it's not as urgent as you might imagine right now. As the day advances, the Moon heads into your home and family sector, and you may need some extra reassurance or security before pushing forward. It’s an important phase in the lunar cycle for centering yourself.

Energies can be stop-and-go at times today, dear Sagittarius. On the one hand, you may want to get moving on a personal or home matter, and on the other, distractions are plenty, and you’re tuning into them rather than tuning them out! This may mean you’re not truly decided on what you want to get done. Home and family are areas of special interest for you these days, as well as areas that need some reworking. You have time to make improvements here, so try not to give in to pressures to get everything done too quickly. There is a tendency to worry, fret, and overthink today, but it's unlikely to get you to an improved position. Tap into increased enthusiasm for making yourself more secure and comfortable.

There can be much in the way of starting and stopping at times today, dear Capricorn. Whether it’s due to inner indecision or outside forces that seem to be holding you back, you may need more time to get things right. Tension can magnify a difference of opinion, but the viewpoint itself may not be the true problem. There's a stronger focus on learning, transportation, projects, and daily affairs for you these days, with some complications to sort out in these areas. While discussing non-personal matters comes easily today, with more personal topics, there can be some hesitation about sharing certain information or remorse for sharing too much right now! Still, if you don't challenge yourself today, you may feel irritable. Do watch for impatience and pushing things that require subtlety.

The Moon moves into your sign for a visit of over two days, dear Aquarius, drawing your strong attention to your emotional needs, especially the unmet ones! While it can be somewhat moody, it's an important part of a larger cycle and a good time to start fresh. Still, while you're craving action, you’re not quite sure where to put your energies. A game plan or mission seems to be missing now, but it may be a good idea to slow things down to adjust. Be sure to watch for communications that don’t express what you truly feel, and try not to overthink things.

The Moon heads into your privacy sector today, dear Pisces, drawing your attention to background and private matters. It's time to take some pressure off your life so you can regroup. Still, with today's transits, you could crave action but it's not straightforward what to do with yourself or what channel to take. It can be a bit frustrating, but it could lead to creative workarounds. There can be a dilemma that pits your sense of independence against a need for a connection. Overthinking is a tendency: you're inclined to separate your affections and feelings from your decision-making, which is useful only up to a point! Aim to put off actions until you know what you want or how to go about pursuing your plans.
